blocks.body: Present Continuous Passive is used to describe actions happening right now or temporary processes in the passive state. Formula: am/is/are + being + V3.

{ "title": "10. Short summary", "items": [ "Present Continuous Passive: am/is/are + being + V3.", "Choose be: I → am, He/She/It → is, You/We/They → are.", "being is an invariant part, always before V3.", "Negation: am/is/are + not + being + V3.", "Question: Am/Is/Are + Subject + being + V3?", "Used for: action right now, temporary processes, current changes.", "Time markers: now, right now, at the moment, currently, this week, etc.", "Do not confuse with Present Simple Passive (regular actions)!" ] }
